name: Junk Corner
subtitle: Power returns to dead metal.
completionText: It shouldn't be alive yet. But it is.
guideTone: encouraging, patient, instructional, slightly amused by how broken everything is
guideIntroLine: This is where it begins. Don't worry if it looks broken. Broken things can still wake up.

transformationStages.name: Dead Dust
transformationStages.description: Dead, dusty, flickering setup with weak light and broken hardware. Screws litter the desk. The fan doesn't spin.

transformationStages.name: First Light
transformationStages.description: Cleaned desk, patched case, first glowing diagnostics. Wiring is visibly stable. One monitor flickers to life.

transformationStages.name: Awakened Prototype
transformationStages.description: Fully awakened prototype corner with active monitors, pulsing case core, and cleaner space. The second core hums beneath.

secrets.title: The Motherboard Sequence
secrets.description: A specific corner of the motherboard flashes when clicked in the correct order.
secrets.hint: Watch the top-left pins. They react to a pattern.

secrets.title: The Dead Port
secrets.description: Not all dead ports are truly dead. One USB slot still carries a signal.
secrets.hint: The guide mentions ports that aren't really gone.

secrets.title: The Eternal Screw
secrets.description: Repeated salvage interactions reveal one screw that never leaves the desk.
secrets.hint: Something small refuses to be sorted away.

midSceneTwist.title: Dormant Second Core
midSceneTwist.description: The broken PC was hiding a second dormant core beneath the motherboard.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: A second processing core activates, doubling base tap value and revealing hidden motherboard upgrade paths.

events.title: Core Pulse
events.description: A faint pulse ripples through the motherboard. Something deep inside the tower responds.

events.title: Loose Wire Spark
events.description: A dangling wire sparks against the case. Quick — tap before it grounds out!

events.title: Spare Parts Crate
events.description: You find a crate of old components wedged behind the desk. Most are junk. Some are not.

choices.description: Risky grab — could find gold or dust

events.title: Dust Cloud Shutdown
events.description: A plume of dust triggers a thermal fault. The system flickers dangerously.

events.title: Fan Kickstart
events.description: The main fan coughs to life. For a moment, everything runs cooler and faster.
events.flavorText: Air flow is the first luxury.

events.title: Sticky Note Reminder
events.description: A handwritten sticky note falls from the monitor. It contains a formula someone left behind.

events.title: Salvage Drawer Pop
events.description: A desk drawer pops open on its own. Inside: a handful of usable components.
events.flavorText: The desk remembers what was stored.

events.title: Static Boot Attempt
events.description: The system tries to boot from static charge alone. It almost works.
events.flavorText: Desperation is a form of ingenuity.

events.title: Dormant Core Ping
events.description: A signal emerges from deep inside the motherboard. Something dormant is responding.

rewards.description: A clue about the hidden core

events.title: Hidden Motherboard Port
events.description: Behind a capacitor, you spot an unlabeled port. It pulses faintly when touched.

events.title: Ghost BIOS Screen
events.description: For a split second, a BIOS screen flashes — one that doesn't match any known firmware.
events.flavorText: The machine has memories it shouldn't.

roomLaw.name: Law of Manual Dominance
roomLaw.description: Manual actions are strongest while the setup is unstable
roomLaw.mechanic: Tap power is multiplied while automation is weak or absent

landmark.name: The Scrap Throne
landmark.description: A pile of junk that evolves into a throne of salvaged tech
evolutionStages: A sad heap of rusty bolts
A recognizable chair shape emerges from the scrap
Wires and circuits weave into a functional seat
Salvaged tech hums with repurposed energy
The Scrap Throne radiates with improvised brilliance

hazard.name: Rust Creep
hazard.description: Components degrade over time if not maintained
hazard.triggerCondition: Equipment left idle for extended periods
hazard.penalty: Production efficiency decreases by 15% per decay cycle

stabilizer.name: Grease and Grit
stabilizer.mechanic: Tapping maintenance actions resets decay timers and boosts output briefly

completionCeremony: The junk reshapes itself into a gateway. A faint signal hums from the second core.
midSceneTwistLine: There's another pulse in here. Something underneath the first system.

completionReward.relicEffect: Small permanent bonus to early-room stability and hidden hardware discovery

transitionIn.visual: Black screen, faint boot hum, dusty desk fades in through CRT flicker, one monitor line appears horizontally
transitionIn.audio: Low-frequency boot hum building to a click
transitionIn.titleReveal: Room title resolves from static noise

transitionOut.visual: Machine core pulse expands, dust lifts upward unnaturally, room folds into a bright wireframe outline
transitionOut.audio: Rising digital tone with a snap
transitionOut.titleReveal: Wireframe collapses into next room seed

codexAdditions.title: First Boot Log
codexAdditions.content: The first current to flow through dead silicon. It shouldn't have worked.

codexAdditions.title: Scrap Component Archive
codexAdditions.content: Catalog of salvaged parts recovered from the original junk pile.

codexAdditions.title: Wake Sequence
codexAdditions.content: I remember the moment the first LED blinked. It felt like a heartbeat.

codexAdditions.title: The Corner That Started It
codexAdditions.content: Every machine empire begins somewhere. This one began in a pile of discarded parts.
